all.en: Thank you for agreeing to serve as a reference for our candidate.
all.zh: 感謝您同意擔任我們候選人的推薦人。

all.en: Your honest feedback will help us make a well-informed hiring decision.
all.zh: 您誠實的回饋將協助我們做出充分知情的聘用決定。

all.en: All responses will be kept strictly confidential and used internally only.
all.zh: 所有回覆將嚴格保密並僅供內部使用。

all.en: Please confirm the candidate full name and the dates of employment.
all.zh: 請確認候選人的全名及任職期間。

all.en: In what capacity did you work with this individual on a daily basis?
all.zh: 您與此人是以何種身分共事的？

all.en: How long did your direct working relationship last in total?
all.zh: 您與其直接共事的時間總計多久？

all.en: Could you describe the candidate primary responsibilities and scope?
all.zh: 您可否描述候選人的主要職責與工作範圍？

all.en: On a scale of one to ten, how would you rate overall performance?
all.zh: 若以一到十分評分，您會給予的整體表現幾分？

all.en: What would you identify as the candidate greatest professional strengths?
all.zh: 您認為候選人最大的專業強項為何？

all.en: Are there any specific areas in which growth or development is needed?
all.zh: 是否有特定領域需要成長或加強？

all.en: How effectively does the candidate communicate with peers and senior leaders?
all.zh: 候選人與同儕及高階主管的溝通效果如何？

all.en: Please comment on their reliability, punctuality, and follow-through.
all.zh: 請就其可靠度、守時及貫徹力提出評論。

all.en: How does the candidate handle pressure, conflict, or shifting priorities?
all.zh: 候選人如何處理壓力、衝突或不斷變動的優先順序？

all.en: Can you provide an example of a notable contribution they made?
all.zh: 您能否舉出他們做出顯著貢獻的具體例子？

all.en: Would you describe them as a team player or more of an individual contributor?
all.zh: 您會形容他們為團隊合作者或較偏向個人貢獻者？

all.en: How well do they receive constructive criticism and apply feedback?
all.zh: 他們接受建設性批評並運用回饋的能力如何？

all.en: Is there anything that prevented them from achieving full potential?
all.zh: 是否有任何因素阻礙他們發揮全部潛力？

all.en: Knowing what you know now, would you hire this person again?
all.zh: 依您目前所知，您是否願意再次聘用此人？

all.en: Do you have any concerns regarding integrity, ethics, or professional conduct?
all.zh: 您對其誠信、倫理或職業操守是否有任何疑慮？

all.en: Would you recommend the candidate for a senior individual contributor role?
all.zh: 您是否會推薦該候選人擔任資深個人貢獻者職位？

all.en: Please feel free to add any additional comments you consider relevant.
all.zh: 若有其他您認為相關的補充說明，請自由填寫。

all.en: Kindly return the completed form within five business days if possible.
all.zh: 請盡可能於五個工作天內回傳填寫完畢的表單。

all.en: If you prefer a phone interview, our recruiter will gladly arrange one.
all.zh: 若您偏好電話訪談，我們的招募人員樂於協助安排。

all.en: We greatly appreciate the time and care you have devoted to this request.
all.zh: 我們非常感謝您為此項請求所付出的時間與用心。
